Oligopeptide-103 is a synthetic peptide containing 20 amino acids consisting of alanine, asparagine, glycine, histidine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, proline, serine, and threonine.
Butylene Glycol Sesquiisostearate is a mixture of mono- and diesters of Butylene Glycol and Isostearic Acid
Sodium Methyl Stearate Sulfonate is the sodium salt of the sulfonated methyl ester of Stearic Acid.
Acetyl Beta-Alanyl Tripeptide-50 is the reaction product of acetic acid and a synthetic peptide consisting of β-alanine and Tripeptide-50.
Prunus Pedunculata Seed Oil is the oil expressed from the seeds of Prunus Pedunculata, Rosaceae.
Viola Corsica Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Viola corsica, Violaceae.
Rosa Alba Flower Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the flowers of Rosa alba.
Passiflora Caerulea Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of Passiflora caerulea, Passifloracea.
Momordica Charantia Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Momordica charantia, Cucurbitaceae.
Stevia Rebaudiana Leaf/Stem Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground leaves and stems of Stevia rebaudiana.
Brassica Oleracea Italica Seed is the seed derived from Brassica oleracea italica, Brassicaceae.
Cetearamidoethyldiethonium Succinoyl Hydrolyzed Pea Protein is the quaternary ammonium salt formed by the reaction of cetearamidoethyl diethylamine and succinoyl hydrolyzed pea protein.
Citrus Tamurana Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Citrus tamurana, Rutaceae.
Rubus Arcticus Fruit Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the fruit of Rubus arcticus, Rosaceae.
Acetyl Pentapeptide-35 is the product obtained by the acetylation of Pentapeptide-35.
Polyquaternium-99 is the polymeric quaternary ammonium salt formed from butyl methacrylate, 2-ethoxyethylmethacrylate and methacryloyloxyethyl trimethyl ammonium chloride.

Kluyveromyces/Lactobacillus/Walnut Seed Ferment Oil Filtrate is a filtrate of the oil expressed from the seeds of Juglans regia fermented by the microorganisms, Kluyveromyces and Lactobacillus.

PEG/PPG-30/10 Maleimide/Styrene Copolymer is the copolymer formed by the reaction of styrene and maleic anhydride to form a copolymer which is further reacted with an amine-terminated random copolymer of ethylene oxide and propylene oxide. The amine reacts with the maleic anhydride groups to produce maleimide groups and form a copolymer with PEG/PPG copolymer side chains.

Bis-Hydroxyethyl Acrylate Poly(1,4-Butanediol)-9/TMHDI Copolymer is a copolymer of poly(1,4-butanediol)-9 and trimethylhexanediisocyanate (TMHDI) end-capped with hydroxyethylacrylate.
